opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is pounding out of my chest, I can't stop shaking, and if I stand up I feel like I'm going to have a stroke.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared badly over two days — standing sets off a racing heart and shaking and I'm terrified it's my heart.

symptom_narrative.character: pounding/bounding racing heart, full-body tremor and adrenaline-rush on standing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: terrifying; feels like an impending cardiac event
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body shaking and pounding heart when upright
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: strictly on standing; settles lying flat
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: intense anxiety, tremor, and post-episode exhaustion
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have hyperadrenergic POTS and get surges, but this is severe

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and I'm frightened
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: no recent caffeine change, no decongestants

objective_data_offered.value: about 75 lying down, ~140 within a minute of standing (home wearable)
around 120/80 lying and ~155/100 standing on my home cuff
I'm shaky and flushed and breathing fast when upright
